fixture.title: Catalog Opportunity Ranking Fixture
fixture.summary: Synthetic public fixture input and expected output for deterministic catalog opportunity ranking across engines, translation gaps, demand buckets, readiness evidence, and official-English demotions.

license.evidence: Hand-authored synthetic catalog records, public numeric demand facts, public capability labels, aggregate local evidence counts, and expected ranking output; no third-party raw assets.

provenance.author: Itotori contributors
provenance.creationMethod: Hand-authored synthetic fixture for CATALOG-061 opportunity ranking read-model and leakage-policy verification.

aggregateStats.notes: Covers no-English, MTL-only, fan-partial, official-English-conflict, demand-ranked pools, public readiness evidence, and CATALOG-007-style private-local aggregate evidence without raw private material.
